title: tinus javanica
intro: Tinus javanica, also known as Thai Motherwort or Thai Mother of the Forest, is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a cardiotonic and nervine, helping to regulate heart rate and alleviate stress. The health benefits of Tinus javanica include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional soups and infusions to promote overall well-being.
